colorUsage: Use Champagne Cream as the main can ground, Spritz Coral for the dominant vertical brand panel and wordmark, Velvet Plum for the top and bottom rings, Mango Spark for sparkle/fizz accents, and Soft Fig for small product facts. Use Lychee Blush as a soft flavour halo behind fruit motifs.
context: Primary product packaging for a slim social protein drink can.
imagePrompt: Studio product render of a slim 250ml aluminium can on a warm neutral surface, adult premium fruity drink styling, abstract coral and plum label blocks, small golden sparkle and fizz motifs, simple citrus and mango shape illustrations, condensation droplets, soft bar-fridge lighting, shallow shadow, no readable text, no visible logos, no leaves, no gym or supplement props, clean premium ready-to-drink beverage aesthetic.
layout: Slim can wrap with a 22mm Velvet Plum top band and 18mm bottom band. Front face: oversized vertical PEP wordmark occupying roughly 55% of height, centred slightly above midline. Tagline 'Feel good. Have fun.' sits below in one line. Product facts appear as three small rounded badges in a horizontal row near the lower third, subordinate to the occasion message. Add a partial citrus-disc mark behind the wordmark at 18% opacity and small sparkle/fizz motifs around the shoulder.
name: Can label — bar-fridge ready
typographyUsage: PEP wordmark: Fraunces 9pt SuperSoft Black, custom tightened, approx. 92–110pt equivalent on front. Tagline: DM Sans Medium, 13–15pt. Small serve phrase such as 'fruity social protein drink': Lobster Two Bold Italic, 16–18pt, used once. Badges: Space Grotesk Bold uppercase, 8–9pt with tracking +6.

colorUsage: After-Dark Grape background with Spritz Coral headline block, Mango Spark sparkles, Cream Foam text and a small Raspberry Pulse accent ribbon. Keep product facts in Cream Foam outlines, not filled neon labels.
context: Single Instagram square card for launch or event announcement.
imagePrompt: Square editorial social media graphic scene, premium alcohol-free social drink mood, deep evening background with warm abstract fruit shapes, sparkle bursts, curved garnish ribbon, subtle grain-free flat design, central empty space for typography, festive but uncluttered, adult hospitality energy, no readable text, no logos, no bottles of alcohol, no cartoon characters.
layout: 1080x1080 square. Use a large Spritz Coral rounded rectangle tilted 3 degrees across the middle, covering 70% width and 42% height. Place headline centred in the rectangle over two lines. Add a small script phrase at the upper-left corner and a badge cluster bottom-right. Fruit-disc motif sits cropped off the top-right edge; small sparkles orbit the headline area.
name: Social post — night-out invitation
typographyUsage: Headline: Fraunces 9pt SuperSoft Black, 88–104px, line-height 0.9. Supporting phrase: Lobster Two Bold Italic, 34px. Body line/date: DM Sans Medium, 24px. Badges: Space Grotesk Bold uppercase, 18px, inside pill outlines.

colorUsage: Champagne Cream card stock, Velvet Plum primary text, Spritz Coral section dividers, Mango Spark badge seals and Lychee Blush reverse side. Use After-Dark Grape only for a narrow footer bar to add venue credibility.
context: Small table card or menu insert for cafés, bars, events and dinner venues.
imagePrompt: Premium café bar table setting with a small upright menu card on a wooden table, warm evening hospitality lighting, coupe glass with ice water, fruit garnish shapes nearby, abstract coral and plum design on the card, no readable text, no visible logos, no alcohol labels, no leaves or herbs, shallow depth of field, elegant but approachable social-drink mood.
layout: A6 portrait table card. Top 20% reserved for small mark and PEP name. Middle contains a large menu-style headline: 'Your 0.0% social serve' or similar. Below, three short lines explain flavour, alcohol-free occasion and light protein benefit. Bottom third has three small badges in a row and a QR code placeholder aligned right. Reverse side uses a full Lychee Blush field with a cropped coral fruit-disc motif.
name: Venue card — menu insert
typographyUsage: Headline: Fraunces 9pt SuperSoft Black, 32–38pt. Menu copy: DM Sans Regular, 10.5–12pt with generous line spacing. Script accent: Lobster Two Bold Italic, 18pt for one phrase like 'with friends'. Badges: Space Grotesk Bold uppercase, 7.5–8.5pt.

colorUsage: Use a warm photographic palette supported by Champagne Cream overlays, Spritz Coral CTA buttons, Velvet Plum navigation text and Mango Spark micro-motifs. Do not place product imagery in this hero; let the brand mood lead.
context: Full-bleed website hero with no product, pure brand mood.
imagePrompt: Full-bleed website hero photograph, golden-hour outdoor social setting, close friends arriving at a rooftop table, sparkling alcohol-free drinks in simple glassware, fruit slices and ice catching the light, candid hands and laughter without visible faces dominating, warm premium hospitality mood, shallow depth of field, no readable text, no logos, no alcohol bottles, no gym objects, no leaves or botanical garnish, spacious area on left for website copy.
layout: Desktop 16:9 hero. Full-bleed lifestyle image with a soft dark gradient overlay from left to right. Left column: small badge row at top, main headline in 2–3 lines, one sentence of body copy, coral CTA button and secondary text link. Right side remains image-led with glassware and social cues. Add two tiny Mango Spark sparkle motifs near the headline, not as confetti clutter.
name: Brand hero — start of a good night
typographyUsage: Hero headline: Fraunces 9pt SuperSoft Black, 76–96px desktop / 44–54px mobile. Body: DM Sans Regular, 18–21px. CTA: Space Grotesk Bold uppercase, 14px with tracking +8. Optional accent phrase: Lobster Two Bold Italic, 32px.

colorUsage: Photography should pick up Spritz Coral through props or background surfaces, with Velvet Plum shadows and Mango Spark highlights from fruit/lighting. Packaging remains Champagne Cream-led so it reads clearly in real environments.
context: Product in a real-world social setting for web, press and paid social.
imagePrompt: Lifestyle product photograph of two unbranded slim cans with abstract coral, cream and plum labels on a lively outdoor bar table, condensation, citrus wheels and mango slices, ice bucket edge, warm sunset lighting, friends' hands entering frame with glasses, premium festival-adjacent atmosphere, no readable text, no visible logos, no alcohol brands, no leaves, no gym or supplement objects, shallow depth of field.
layout: Landscape crop 4:3 and adaptable square. Product pair sits in the lower-right third, one can upright and one angled slightly toward camera. Left side remains open for headline overlay. Add a small badge cluster above the cans if used in digital ads, never more than three badges. Keep the setting social and tactile: table, ice, fruit, glassware, hands.
name: Product lifestyle — social table moment
typographyUsage: Overlay headline if needed: Fraunces 9pt SuperSoft Black, 44–58px. Body line: DM Sans Medium, 18–20px. Badges: Space Grotesk Bold uppercase, 13–15px. Script should be optional and limited to one short flourish.

colorUsage: Top half in Spritz Coral with Cream Foam headline, bottom half in After-Dark Grape with Mango Spark and Raspberry Pulse accents. Use Champagne Cream for product silhouette area and badge fills to preserve premium contrast.
context: Vertical 9:16 social story ad for launch, venue availability or alcohol-free night-out messaging.
imagePrompt: Vertical 9:16 premium social drink advertising composition, abstract split background with warm energetic top and deep evening lower section, unbranded slim can silhouette area, floating fruit slices, sparkle bursts and fizz bubbles, dynamic diagonal movement, polished ready-to-serve beverage mood, no readable text, no logos, no alcohol bottles, no cartoon style, no leaves, no gym references.
layout: 1080x1920 story. Top 15% contains small badge row. Main headline stacked in the upper-middle over three short lines. Centre has a large can/product window or abstract can silhouette, angled 8 degrees. Bottom 22% includes CTA pill, one line of body copy and venue/social proof placeholder. Diagonal garnish ribbon connects top-left to bottom-right for motion.
name: Story ad — order something fun
typographyUsage: Headline: Fraunces 9pt SuperSoft Black, 92–116px, tight leading. Small intro phrase: Lobster Two Bold Italic, 42px. Body/CTA: DM Sans Medium 30px and Space Grotesk Bold uppercase 24px for the CTA. Badges: Space Grotesk Bold uppercase, 21px.
